title: gomphandra tetrandra
intro: Gomphandra tetrandra, also known as the East Indian laurel or Chinese ginseng tree, is a species of plant in the family Gelsemiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gomphandra tetrandra include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken to reap its medicinal benefits.
